channel.title: I wrote a blog post about how to use FeaturedImage component on Post component
channel.description:
Hi,
I created a blog post to my own blog about below topic.
How to add Featured Image To Post Component on Frontity Framework [https://codeformylife.fi/how-to-add-a-featured-image-to-the-post-component-on-the-frontity-framework/](https://codeformylife.fi/how-to-add-a-featured-image-to-the-post-component-on-the-frontity-framework/)
Feel free to comment if there is wrongly understood content. :grin:

item.title: I wrote a blog post about how to use FeaturedImage component on Post component
item.dc:creator: Reyes
item.source: I wrote a blog post about how to use FeaturedImage component on Post component

item.title: I wrote a blog post about how to use FeaturedImage component on Post component
item.dc:creator: marika.kononen
item.description:
That’s good to hear!
Yes, it is definitely ok for me, you can add it to your newsletter.

Read full topic
item.source: I wrote a blog post about how to use FeaturedImage component on Post component

item.title: I wrote a blog post about how to use FeaturedImage component on Post component
item.dc:creator: Reyes
item.description:
Hi @marika.kononen!

Many thanks for writing this post. I’m sure this will be super helpful for other users!

Would be ok for you if I share it as well in our newsletter?

Read full topic
